title: Robert Cursio appointed Subsidiary President for two Chugach Government Solutions subsidiaries, Wolf Creek Federal Services, Inc. and Chugach Federal Services, Inc.
summary: Chugach Government Solutions, LLC, (CGS) is pleased to welcome Robert Cursio to our subsidiary leadership team. Cursio is the new Subsidiary President for Wolf Creek Federal Services, Inc. (WCFS) and Chugach Federal Services, Inc. (CFSI). Robert is a U.S. Army veteran with over 17 years of executive leadership...

title: June 2024 Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: June 11, 2024 SUMMARY Congratulations, we’ve made it to June, which brings the promise of another beautiful summer season! I hope everyone is enjoying the start of summer in Alaska – that special time of year when we all strive to balance our work responsibilities with our favorite outdoor activities. For those who love spending time on or around water, please remember to wear a life jacket to stay safe. This last month has been particularly busy, filled with travel, meetings, and as I mentioned, opportunities to enjoy the magnificent Alaskan outdoors. Last week, I had the privilege of attending the Alaska Power Association Federal Legislative Conference in Washington, D.C., alongside several colleagues from the Railbelt. The conference was excellent and plays a crucial role in our federal government relations efforts, allowing us to effectively communicate the key issues faced by Alaska’s electric utilities. The insights and connections gained from this event will be invaluable as we...
